title: Better visibility for files attached to items.
excerpt: It is a bit messy to have 2 different areas for files - one within the Updates pop out box and another inside a column for files on the board. Wouldn’t it be better for the Files column to display the files already store…

posts.author: Deafzone (Tony Barlow)
posts.cookedHtml: It is a bit messy to have 2 different areas for files - one within the Updates pop out box and another inside a column for files on the board. Wouldn’t it be better for the Files column to display the files already stored in the item or have a toggle to display files, hidden away in the Updates box, to show on Files column.

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tony,

Have you tried using the Files Gallery view? This view pulls in files found in updates + Files column on each board and creates a library of files.
